subject: re: JP & Fancelli
body:
For the past six weeks I have requested from JP Molyneux's office the
following information:

 

a)      Pictures of Library and Pool Woodworking

b)      Detailed invoices explaining how Fancelli spent 800,000 and
88,000 Euro on Library and Pool woodworking

c)       Evidence of the wire transfers made to  Fancelli evidencing
that JP Molyneux paid the full amount to Fancelli (1,050,000 for Library
and 379,500 for Pool sent to him in December 20th  2006) immediately
after it was received as he stated to me when we met in your office
around February 15th 

 

The only item that I have received to date is evidence of the wire
transfers made from JP Molyneux to Fancelli.  Listed below are the
amounts and dates that I have verified were in fact sent to Fancelli.  

 

Library Woodworking

12/21/2006         320,000                 JP Molyneux had credit with
Fancelli so he applied it to your account. No actual money was sent via
wire transfer.                           

2/12/2007            200,000                 Verified wire transfer

9/28/2007            300,000                 Verified wire transfer

1/29/2008            250,000                 Verified wire transfer

                                

                Total Paid & Applied by JP Molyneux from 12/21/2006 -
1/29/2008:         1,070,000 Euro

                Total Paid by Mr. Epstein on 12/20/2006:
1,050,000 Euro

 

My concern  is that we have sent false deposits based on
misrepresentations by JP Molyneux when he stated these amounts were
requested by Fancelli.

                                

 

Pool Woodworking

1/4/2007              220,000                 Verified wire transfer

 

                Total Paid by JP Molyneux 1/4/2007:
220,000 Euro

                Total Paid by Mr. Epstein on 12/20/2006:
379,500 Euro

 

My concern  is that we have sent false deposits based on
misrepresentations by JP Molyneux when he stated these amounts were
requested by Fancelli.

 

 

The attached PDF file details  the total amount paid for JP Molyneux
design fees (1,050,000), deposits for work to be performed (2,427,819),
fees paid to  The Maguire Group (511,107) and miscellaneous office and
travel expenses (209,122).    

 

 

Rich Kahn

New York Strategy Group LLC

457 Madison Avenue, 4th Floor

New York, NY 10021

tel 212-891-6430

fax 212-750-2408

cell 917-414-7584
body_html:
For the past six weeks I have requested from JP Molyneux’s office the following information:

 

a)      Pictures of Library and Pool Woodworking

b)      Detailed invoices explaining how Fancelli spent 800,000 and 88,000 Euro on Library and Pool woodworking

c)       Evidence of the wire transfers made to  Fancelli evidencing that JP Molyneux paid the full amount to Fancelli (1,050,000 for Library and 379,500 for Pool sent to him in December 20th  2006) immediately after it was received as he stated to me when we met in your office around February 15th

 

The only item that I have received to date is evidence of the wire transfers made from JP Molyneux to Fancelli.  Listed below are the amounts and dates that I have verified were in fact sent to Fancelli. 

 

Library Woodworking

12/21/2006         320,000                 JP Molyneux had credit with Fancelli so he applied it to your account. No actual money was sent via wire transfer.                           

2/12/2007            200,000                 Verified wire transfer

9/28/2007            300,000                 Verified wire transfer

1/29/2008            250,000                 Verified wire transfer

                               

                Total Paid & Applied by JP Molyneux from 12/21/2006 – 1/29/2008:         1,070,000 Euro

                Total Paid by Mr. Epstein on 12/20/2006:                                                               1,050,000 Euro

 

My concern  is that we have sent false deposits based on misrepresentations by JP Molyneux when he stated these amounts were requested by Fancelli.

                               

 

Pool Woodworking

1/4/2007              220,000                 Verified wire transfer

 

                Total Paid by JP Molyneux 1/4/2007:                       220,000 Euro

                Total Paid by Mr. Epstein on 12/20/2006:               379,500 Euro

 

My concern  is that we have sent false deposits based on misrepresentations by JP Molyneux when he stated these amounts were requested by Fancelli.

 

 

The attached PDF file details  the total amount paid for JP Molyneux design fees (1,050,000), deposits for work to be performed (2,427,819),  fees paid to  The Maguire Group (511,107) and miscellaneous office and travel expenses (209,122).    

 

 

Rich Kahn

New York Strategy Group LLC

457 Madison Avenue, 4th Floor

New York, NY 10021

tel 212-891-6430

fax 212-750-2408

cell 917-414-7584
